title: Budget Policy Report
purpose: Define a review-only report for budget metadata coverage, local/static budget pressure, unknown timing states, and human/App-layer recommendations without mutating orchestration state.
trigger: Run or prepare when the orchestrator needs a bounded budget-policy review before expanding dispatch, concurrency, or review queues.
allowedActions: inspect repo-local roadmap and routine docs read-only
inspect routine budget metadata coverage read-only
inspect optional ledger task budget metadata and timestamps read-only
inspect optional heartbeat budgetSummary and budgetPressure sections read-only
separate metadata coverage, local/static warnings, unknown timing states, and human review recommendations
write a RoutineRunReport JSON when requested by a future implementation
forbiddenActions: stage, commit, merge, push, tag, or release
dispatch sessions or start nested subagents
prioritize, schedule, pause, reschedule, stop, or kill workers
mutate the orchestration ledger or heartbeat report
claim direct runtime, review, or session-timing proof from local/static budget evidence
gates: roadmap and routine docs inspected for budget-policy boundary wording
routine spec budget metadata coverage summarized
optional ledger task budget metadata and timestamps classified as present, missing, stale, or unavailable
optional heartbeat budgetSummary and budgetPressure warnings copied only as local/static evidence
unknown runtime or review timing states recorded under blocked evidence rather than invented
report states that all budget recommendations require Codex App orchestrator or human review

evidence.direct: Reserved for future Codex App or runtime surfaces that explicitly record live session timing; this review-only contract does not emit direct proof.
evidence.proxy: Reserved for accepted external review artifacts or generated heartbeat files when their provenance is recorded; the static fixture normally does not emit proxy proof.
evidence.local: Local static inspection of roadmap text, routine specs, routine docs, optional ledger-shaped JSON, and optional heartbeat budget report sections.
evidence.blocked: Live worker runtime, human review elapsed time, or Codex App session timing is unavailable, ambiguous, or not recorded in the inspected inputs.

escalation: Stop if roadmap, routine specs, or optional JSON inputs cannot be inspected safely.
Escalate to the Codex App orchestrator or human reviewer before pausing dispatch, changing concurrency, or declaring budget enforcement.
Keep missing budget metadata as a review recommendation unless a future human-approved policy defines it as failure.
Label stale or absent timing data as blocked or unknown; do not infer live runtime from static text.
